seoTitle: Mindarra vs Mingenew — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mindarra and Mingenew. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mindarra and Mingenew.
heading: Mindarra vs Mingenew — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mindarra, Western Australia and Mingenew, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mindarra and Mingenew have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Mindarra or Mingenew safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mindarra has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Mingenew scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mindarra scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Mingenew scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mindarra or Mingenew?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mindarra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
